news.t: Cambria Launches Two New ETFs: Micro and Small Cap Shareholder Yield and Fixed Income-Focused Tactical Yield

holdings.infoBox: MYLD is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are ArcBest stock at 1.81%, First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X at 1.79%, Covenant Logistics Group at 1.69%, Avnet at 1.63%, and Patterson-UTI Energy at 1.59%.

overview.description: The Cambria Micro and SmallCap Shareholder Yield ETF (MYLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund offers active exposure to equity securities of micro- and small-sized companies in the US. Securities are selected based on shareholder yield characterized by dividends, net shares buybacks, and debt paydown. MYLD was launched on Jan 4, 2024 and is issued by Cambria.

holdings.n: First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X

data.title: Cambria Launches Two New ETFs: Micro and Small Cap Shareholder Yield and Fixed Income-Focused Tactical Yield
data.text: MANHATTAN BEACH, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cambria Investment Management announced the launch of Cambria Micro and Small Cap Shareholder Yield ETF (MYLD) and Cambria Tactical Yield ETF (TYLD).
